mapper.insert: INSERT INTO excel_column_config (table_name, field_name, column_name_zh_cn, column_name_en_us, sort, enabled, entity) VALUES (#{tableName}, #{fieldName}, #{columnNameZhCn}, #{columnNameEnUs}, #{sort}, #{enabled}, #{entity})

INSERT INTO excel_column_config (table_name, field_name, column_name_zh_cn, column_name_en_us, sort, enabled, entity) VALUES
(#{item.tableName}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.columnNameZhCn}, #{item.columnNameEnUs}, #{item.sort}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.entity})
